title: juncus × inundatus
intro: Juncus × inundatus, also known as the hybrid or flood rush, is a plant species that belongs to the rush family and is characterized by its distinctive, cylindrical stem and feathery leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Juncus × inundatus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
